fixtures.title: Standard Customer Issue Triage
fixtures.body:
INBOUND EMAIL FROM: customer@example.com
SUBJECT: Bug report - Export button failing on analytics page
BODY:
Hi Support Team,

Every time I try to click the CSV export button on the main analytics dashboard, the page spins for a few seconds and then throws a 500 error. Can you please look into why this is failing?

Thanks,
Alex

fixtures.title: Standard Feature Enhancement Request
fixtures.body:
INBOUND EMAIL FROM: partner@company.org
SUBJECT: Feature Request: Dark mode option for settings
BODY:
Hello,

We love using the platform for our daily workflows. One small request from our team: would it be possible to add a native dark mode toggle in the user settings? It would really help during late-night reviews.

Best regards,
Jordan

fixtures.title: Unrelated Inbound Message
fixtures.body:
INBOUND EMAIL FROM: newsletter@marketing-digest.com
SUBJECT: Your weekly tech digest and trends
BODY:
Check out this week's top stories on artificial intelligence, cloud infrastructure, and software engineering trends!

Unsubscribe here.
